description: Main window baseline. start-dragging is NOT part of core:default — without it every data-tauri-drag-region (overlay titlebar strips) is silently denied and the window cannot be moved. set-webview-zoom backs the in-app Ctrl/Cmd +/- zoom (ZoomProvider owns it instead of zoomHotkeysEnabled, so the macOS titlebar strips can counter-scale for the fixed native traffic lights) — without it setZoom is silently denied and the page stays at 100%. set-theme keeps the macOS vibrancy material in sync with the in-app theme (setWindowTheme) — without it a dark in-app theme sits on a light material and the translucent sidebar washes out.
